title: Alaris Prime colonial war
content:

{{Quote|The clouds of battle amass. The foes gather. I sense a war coming.|Qui-Gon Jinn|audio=ISenseWar.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
Between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]], a '''colonial war''' was fought on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] between a group of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Alaris Prime colonists|colonists]], the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], and the moon's population of [[Gundark/Legends|gundarks]], a [[Diet/Legends|predatory]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Alaris Prime was a lost resource-rich world in the same [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|system]] as the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], from which Wookiee [[Scout/Legends|explorers]] had [[Discovery of Alaris Prime|rediscovered]] it twenty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the war. A petition was brought to the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] for the [[Alaris Prime colonization resolution|rights]] to [[Colonist/Legends|colonize]] the moon, and after two [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of debate, the rights were awarded to the Wookiees, who embarked towards the moon under the leadership of [[Wookiee Chieftain|Chieftain]] [[Attichitcuk/Legends|Attichitcuk]], while the Trade Federation sent its [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]] to secretly claim Alaris Prime. Attichitcuk's first [[Attichitcuk's camp|settlement]] was [[Attack on Attichitcuk's camp|attacked]] by gundarks, and the constant threat of the creatures prompted both factions to plan to [[Skirmish at the gundark nest|exterminate]] them at the [[Unidentified gundark nest|gundarks' nest]].

With the help of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], the Wookiees trained a small group of [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], which [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], Attichitcuk's [[Reproduction/Legends|son]], led to the nest. There, they discovered Trade Federation [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] [[Death/Legends|slaughtering]] the gundarks. The [[Droid/Legends|droids]] tried to fire upon the Wookiees next but were destroyed. The Wookiees began intensifying their military training to defend against the Trade Federation, and while on a reconnaissance mission, Attichitcuk was nearly [[Ambush of Attichitcuk|killed]] by Trade Federation [[Battle Droid Beta Version]]s. Chewbacca took [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of the Wookiee colonists after [[Rescue of Attichitcuk|rescuing]] his [[Parent/Legends|father]] and, with Jinn's help, he worked towards further offensives against the Trade Federation.

Chewbacca trained Wookiees to [[Attack on the Trade Federation outpost|attack]] a [[Trade Federation outpost]], defended an [[Attack on Chewbacca's camp|attack]] on his [[Chewbacca's camp|camp]], and [[Attack on the Trade Federation listening array|destroyed]] a [[Trade Federation listening array]]. Finally, Chewbacca decided to rid Alaris Prime of the Trade Federation presence, organizing a large assault on the Trade Federation's main [[Unidentified Trade Federation base|base]] with the help of Jinn, his recuperated [[Gender/Legends|father]], and cousin [[Shoran]]. In what was known as the [[Battle for Alaris Prime]], the Wookiees destroyed the Trade Federation's [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]], ending the war and securing their control of the moon. Alaris Prime became a thriving technological hub for the Republic and attained [[Currency/Legends|economic]] success under Chewbacca's leadership.

==Prelude==
===A new world===
{{Quote|An unexplored world is a hostile world. I must help the Wookiee leader Attichitcuk to learn the lay of the land. Only then can we find an appropriate place to settle.|Qui-Gon Jinn|audio=HelpingAttichitcuk.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
[[File:Alarisprime.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Alaris Prime, where the colonial war took place]]
[[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] was a small but resource-rich [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alaris/Legends|Alaris]] in the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. [[Time/Legends|Sometime]] after<ref name="GB" /> a [[Skirmish on Alaris Prime|skirmish]] there during the [[New Sith Wars]] in [[1002 BBY]],<ref name="Bane">''[[Darth Bane: Dynasty of Evil]]'' describes a [[Skirmish on Alaris Prime|skirmish]] occurring on [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] one [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after [[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel's]] expulsion from the [[Gloom Walkers]], which in turn took place one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the beginning of the main events of ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' and thereby corresponds to [[1002 BBY]], according to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''. Therefore, Alaris Prime's disappearance from the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] view, as described in the DataBank of ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', must have occurred after 1002 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].</ref> Alaris Prime disappeared from [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] view, hidden by the large size of Alaris. [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Scout/Legends|explorers]] from the planet [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] [[Discovery of Alaris Prime|rediscovered]] Alaris Prime<ref name="GB" /> between [[59 BBY/Legends|59 BBY]] and [[56 BBY/Legends|56 BBY]]<ref name="NEC & GB">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] [[Colonist/Legends|colonial]] war between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]]. Furthermore, the ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' DataBank states that the debate over the [[Alaris Prime colonization resolution|rights]] to Alaris Prime spanned a twenty-[[Standard year/Legends|year]] period following the [[Moon/Legends|moon's]] [[Discovery of Alaris Prime|rediscovery]], meaning that the latter event took place between [[59 BBY/Legends|59 BBY]] and [[56 BBY/Legends|56 BBY]].</ref> and petitioned the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to give them the rights to lead a [[Colonist/Legends|colonization]] effort on the moon, represented by [[Wookiee Chieftain|Chieftain]] [[Attichitcuk/Legends|Attichitcuk]].<ref name="GB" />

During the negotiations, the [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] company known as the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] expressed interest in Alaris Prime, intending to use it as a [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] center between planets such as Kashyyyk, [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], and [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]].<ref name="GB" /> The company also planned to launch secret manufacturing operations there among other remote worlds, which the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] volunteered to participate in, although his [[Sith Master/Legends|master]], [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], who was secretly manipulating the Trade Federation for the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Grand Plan/Legends|Grand Plan]], rejected his proposal.<ref name="Plagueis">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref> After two [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of deliberation, the Republic gave the rights to Alaris Prime to the Wookiees, who named Attichitcuk the leader of the [[Alaris Prime colonists|colonists]] in honor of his [[Politics/Legends|political]] service.<ref name="GB" />

===First landings===
{{Quote|Looks like he's already staking a claim.|Qui-Gon Jinn, upon seeing Attichitcuk's camp|audio=AttichitcuksCamp.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
[[File:Thalmussen_voyage.png|thumb|left|250px|The ''Thalmussen'' travels to Alaris Prime.]]
The Wookiee colonists embarked for Alaris Prime in the [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] ''[[Thalmussen]]'' and three other [[Colony ship/Legends|colony ships]]<ref name="GB" /> sometime between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" /> Among the travelers were [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Shoran]]—Attichitcuk's [[Reproduction/Legends|son]]<ref name="GB" /> and [[Gender/Legends|nephew]], respectively.<ref name="TT">''[[Tyrant's Test]]''</ref> [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] was also sent by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] to [[Advisor/Legends|advise]] the Wookiees and remotely instruct them in gathering resources and exploring. Despite being denied colonial rights, the Trade Federation secretly sent its [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]] to Alaris Prime along with its allies, [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Slaver/Legends|slavers]] led by [[Pekt]]. The Federation reached the moon before the Wookiees did and began establishing bases there. One [[Power core/Legends|power core]] was built and subsequently attacked by [[Diet/Legends|predatory]] creatures known as [[Gundark/Legends|gundarks]], which drove the Federation away from that area, leaving the power core damaged but intact.<ref name="GB" />

Once the Wookiee vessels landed, Attichitcuk was the first to disembark and explore Alaris Prime. He established a small [[Attichitcuk's camp|camp]] north of the landing site, leaving behind [[marker]]s so that the other Wookiees could easily find him. Shoran also began exploring and left behind markers of his own, but he halted upon encountering the damaged Trade Federation power core, as he was unsure of its origin. Chewbacca then left the ships and, following both Shoran's markers and Jinn's remote guidance, also reached the power core. Acting on Jinn's advice, the two Wookiees fired at the power core with their [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]] projectile weapons until it was destroyed and then followed Attichitcuk's markers that led to his camp.<ref name="GB" />

==The war==
===The gundark threat===
{{Quote|The gundarks must have damaged that power core and driven off its owners, we won't be so easily scared away.|Qui-Gon Jinn|audio=GundarkPower.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
[[File:Tutorial_1_gundarks_attack.png|thumb|right|250px|The early battles of the war were fought to repel gundark attacks.]]
Attichitcuk's camp was then [[Attack on Attichitcuk's camp|attacked]] by four gundarks, which were defeated by the three Wookiees. Shortly afterward, a Trade Federation [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] named [[OOL-2]] discovered the remains of the power core destroyed by Chewbacca and Shoran and reported it to the [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]], attributing the destruction to the gundarks. Gunray ordered OOL-2 to locate the gundarks, [[Death/Legends|eradicate]] them, and deliver their [[Hair/Legends|pelts]] to the Trandoshans.<ref name="GB" />

The Wookiees began building more bases, with their next one being a [[Unidentified Wookiee command center|command center]] manned by [[Unidentified Wookiee worker 1|three]] [[Unidentified Wookiee worker 2|Wookiee]] [[Unidentified Wookiee worker 3|workers]]. Jinn aided the workers by instructing them on how to gather resources such as [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]], [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]], [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]], and [[Ore/Legends|ore]], all essential for the colony's survival. The Wookiees also practiced a drill in case of an attack by the gundarks where they would retreat into the [[command center]] and use its [[Autoturret/Legends|turret]] to fire at the beasts. [[Unidentified Wookiee worker 4|Two]] [[Unidentified Wookiee worker 5|more]] workers also arrived at the base to assist in gathering resources along with Chewbacca. When four gundarks suddenly [[Attack on the Wookiee command center|attacked]] the command center, the workers followed the protocol set by the drill and fought off the gundarks with the help of Chewbacca. After the Wookiees had gathered a set threshold of resources, Jinn decided that the gundarks needed to be exterminated for the Wookiees' colonization effort to succeed.<ref name="GB" />

===The Trade Federation attacks===
{{Quote|We have discovered our foes on this distant world. Our lessons are about to take a different path.|Qui-Gon Jinn|audio=AlarisFoes.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
At another [[Unidentified Wookiee base (gundark attack)|base]] led by Chewbacca, Jinn had the workers gather resources for a short time before instructing them to build a [[Barracks/Legends|troop center]] to train [[bowcaster trooper]]s. Concurrently, the Trade Federation sent a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Battle Droid Beta Version]]s to kill the gundarks at their [[Unidentified gundark nest|nest]].<ref name="GB" /> Once at least ten<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] had been trained, Chewbacca led them to [[Skirmish at the gundark nest|attack]] the nest but encountered the Trade Federation finishing off the gundarks. When all the creatures were dead, the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] attacked the Wookiees, who fought back and destroyed all of the [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. The attack at the nest rendered the gundarks extinct on Alaris Prime and alerted the Wookiees to the Trade Federation's presence on the moon, which defined the direction of the colonial effort going forward.<ref name="GB" />

[[File:Itchy-ambush.png|thumb|left|250px|Attichitcuk was ambushed by the Trade Federation.]]
Attichitcuk began a scouting expedition along with two other Wookiees to learn more about the Trade Federation's presence. At another [[Unidentified Wookiee base (Attichitcuk's rescue)|base]] run by Chewbacca, Jinn instructed the Wookiees on further techniques on gathering food, mainly through building [[Farm/Legends|farms]] and [[Animal nursery|animal nurseries]], as well as helping them improve their [[Technology level|level]] of technology. As Attichitcuk headed for the base, he was stopped by a group of Battle Droid Beta Versions [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] by [[DRN-38]], who [[Ambush of Attichitcuk|shot]] the Wookiee [[Chief/Legends|chieftain]] and killed his two companions. Jinn [[Force sense/Legends|sensed]] through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] that Attichitcuk had survived and told Chewbacca to train more bowcaster troopers and build a [[Unidentified Wookiee medical droid|medical droid]] to [[Rescue of Attichitcuk|rescue]] the cheiftain.<ref name="GB" /> A force of eleven Wookiees, including Chewbacca,<ref name="Prima" /> marched towards Attichitcuk's position, destroying all battle droids in their path. After Attichitcuk was found and healed by the [[Wookiee medical droid|medical droid]], the Wookiees returned to their base, also fighting off three [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]] sent by DRN-38 in reprisal.<ref name="GB" />

===Chewbacca's leadership===
{{Quote|Battlefield promotions are not easy to deal with, but Chewbacca handles the leadership role with a skill not often seen.|Qui-Gon Jinn|audio=KingChewie.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
With his [[Parent/Legends|father]] needing time to recover from his wounds, Chewbacca stepped up to lead the colonists and, with Jinn, he began planning the removal of the Trade Federation from Alaris Prime. Hoping to intimidate them through a show of force, Chewbacca's first target was a [[Trade Federation outpost]] commanded by [[GWC-04]], which contained a [[Troop/Legends|troop]] center where B1 battle droids were produced. After two [[HummBike]] scouts located the outpost, Chewbacca trained eleven other Wookiees,<ref name="GB" /> including bowcaster troopers, [[dragon trooper]]s, and [[Thermal detonator trooper (Wookiee)|grenade troopers]]. The Wookiees traveled to the outpost and [[Attack on the Trade Federation outpost|attacked]] it, with the bowcaster troopers defeating the B1 battle droids there and the dragon and [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] troopers destroying the defensive walls and the troop center.<ref name="Prima" />

[[File:Alaris_Prime_colonists.png|thumb|right|250px|Chewbacca organized Wookiee strikes on Trade Federation bases.]]
Following the attack, Chewbacca was present at a [[Chewbacca's camp|settlement]] near another [[Shoran's camp|camp]] run by Shoran. Chewbacca set his workers to gather resources while Jinn instructed him to build a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] to exchange goods with Shoran using [[Corellian HoverFreighter]]s. Shoran discovered a [[Jedi holocron (Alaris Prime)|Jedi holocron]] within his camp, which Jinn sought to retrieve for the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. He contacted the Jedi Council for permission to build a [[Jedi temple (Alaris Prime)|Jedi temple]] on Alaris Prime to store the [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]], a request which the Council granted. Jinn sent his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] to the newly constructed [[Jedi temple/Legends|temple]] to retrieve the holocron.<ref name="GB" />

Shoran then spotted a strike force of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|beetle droids]] and Battle Droid Beta Versions that was heading for Chewbacca's camp under the command of [[LUH-989]]. He warned Jinn about the invaders,<ref name="GB" /> and between five and six Wookiees,<ref name="Prima" /> including Chewbacca, two bowcaster troopers, and a dragon trooper, rallied at the edge of the camp and successfully [[Attack on Chewbacca's camp|repelled]] the droids. Afterward, Kenobi brought the holocron to the Jedi temple, and Shoran discovered a nearby [[Trade Federation listening array]], also run by LUH-989, that was being used to [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on the Wookiee communications.<ref name="GB" /> Chewbacca gathered a force of between eight and thirty Wookiees<ref name="Prima" /> and, combined with Shoran's forces, they [[Attack on the Trade Federation listening array|stormed]] the listening array and destroyed every droid and [[Transmitter/Legends|transmitter]] there.<ref name="GB" />

===War's end===
{{Quote|Chewbacca has wisely decided that we must adopt the stance of our enemy to defeat them. Therefore, Chewbacca has decided that the Trade Federation will have no place on Alaris Prime.|Qui-Gon Jinn|audio=ChewbaccaHatesFeds.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
[[File:Battle_for_Alaris_Prime.png|thumb|left|250px|The Battle for Alaris Prime ended the war.]]
Recognizing the effectiveness of Chewbacca's strategic decisions, Jinn requested permission from the Jedi Council to personally participate in the Wookiees' final assault on the Trade Federation's main [[Unidentified Trade Federation base|base]] in what was known as the [[Battle for Alaris Prime]]. The Council agreed on the condition that the Wookiees construct a [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] in one of their [[Unidentified Wookiee base (fortress)|bases]]. Chewbacca, Shoran, and a recuperated Attichitcuk gathered at the base and directed workers there to gather more resources and construct more buildings to support their military, including the fortress. The Trade Federation commander [[SRAM-13]] sent a group of beetle droids and a droideka to attack Wookiee [[Sentry tower/Legends|sentry posts]] outside the base.<ref name="GB" />

Once the fortress was built, Jinn landed at the Wookiee base, spotting several unusual [[Neimoidian transport|ships]] near the Trade Federation base and correctly suspecting that they belonged to Trandoshan [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] that had arrived to capture the Wookiees. Subsequently, SRAM-13 sent a trio of [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|light droid starfighters]] to scout the base, prompting the Wookiees to increase their air defenses with anti-air [[Missile/Legends|missile]] [[Turret/Legends|turrets]].<ref name="GB" /> Using an [[Airbase/Legends|airbase]] and a [[Heavy Weapons Factory]], the Wookiees manufactured ten [[Agr (starfighter)|Agr]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], three [[Blade bomber|Heavy Blade]] [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]], and three [[Energy pummel/Legends|energy pummels]]. With those forces, along with five [[Sentinel (Wookiees)|Sentinel]] [[Mech/Legends|mechs]] and five heavy bowcaster troopers,<ref name="Prima" /> Jinn and the Wookiee leadership marched towards the Trade Federation base, intent on destroying its fortress.<ref name="GB" /> The bombers and fighters destroyed the defensive turrets and picked off any droids left in the base, after which the [[Ground warfare/Legends|ground]] troops marched in and the [[Energy pummel/Legends|pummels]] demolished the fortress,<ref name="Prima" /> removing the Trade Federation from Alaris Prime.<ref name="GB" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|I have taught all that I can. He is ready to take his place in the galaxy.|Qui-Gon Jinn speaking of Chewbacca|audio=ChewbaccaReady.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
[[File:QGJ_Alaris_Prime.png|thumb|right|300px|Qui-Gon Jinn on Alaris Prime after the war]]
Pekt had been in the Trade Federation fortress at the time of its destruction but escaped aboard one of his transport ships, promising that he would return to the Kashyyyk [[Star system/Legends|system]] as long as Wookiee pelts remained valuable. On Jinn's final transmission to the Jedi Council, he reflected on the skills he had passed on to Chewbacca, believing the Wookiee was ready to find his place in the galaxy.<ref name="GB" /> Darth Sidious was exasperated at the outcome of the war, as he believed the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] leaders of the Trade Federation had carelessly allowed their manufacturing operations on Alaris Prime to be exposed.<ref name="Plagueis" /> Having lost Alaris Prime, Nute Gunray directed the Trade Federation's attention to the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]],<ref name="Prima" /> launching an [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] there in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] in accordance with Sidious's designs.<ref name="NEC" />

The Alaris Prime colony became a thriving technological hub for the Republic<ref name="GB" /> and experienced [[Currency/Legends|economic]] success under Chewbacca's leadership.<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|106|Han Solo: The Early Years}}</ref> After the war, Chewbacca began to explore the wider galaxy beyond Kashyyyk.<ref name="Fact File 13">{{FactFile2014|13|CHE 1-6|Chewbacca}}</ref> Wookiees were still living on the moon by the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" /> The Trade Federation continued to attack Wookiee colony worlds for two decades,<ref name="Cross">''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections]]''</ref> and battles on Alaris Prime occurred into the Clone Wars,<ref name="Encyclopedia">{{CSWECite|I|17|Alaris Prime}}</ref> where the Trade Federation joined the Confederacy. The Wookiee colonists on Alaris Prime were enslaved by the Separatists during the [[Dark Reaper crisis]] and were freed by the Republic in the [[battle on Alaris]], although they were [[Battle of Alaris Prime (Hunt for the Decimator)|attacked]] again during the [[Hunt for the Decimator]].<ref name="NEC" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> the Trade Federation bypassed Kashyyyk's colony worlds to besiege the planet directly in the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]].<ref name="Cross" /> That same year,<ref name="NEC" /> Sidious fulfilled the Grand Plan and [[Declaration of a New Order|transformed]] the Republic into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Pekt collaborated with the Empire to fulfill his plan to profit off of the Wookiees, becoming a major slaver on Kashyyyk. He was ultimately [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|stopped]] by Chewbacca,<ref name="GB" /> who in his travels in the intervening [[Standard year/Legends|years]] had become one of the greatest heroes of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The war for Alaris Prime, particularly Jinn and Kenobi's involvement, was also acknowledged in a [[The New Essential Chronology (in-universe)|chronicle]] of galactic history published in [[36 ABY]].<ref name="NEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Attichitcuk is dead! We must abandon Alaris Prime!|Qui-Gon Jinn if the player fails one of their objectives in the first level of the campaign|audio=AttichitcukDead.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
[[File:Attichitcuk_menu.png|thumb|right|200px|The menu to the Attichitcuk tutorial campaign of ''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'']]
The Alaris Prime colonial war was created for the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'',<ref name="GB" /> which was released on [[November 11]], [[2001]].<ref name="GBDate">{{GameSpot|url=games/star-wars-galactic-battlegrounds|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}}</ref> The war was first mentioned in [[Prima Games]]' [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the game by [[Steven L. Kent]],<ref name="Prima" /> which was published on [[November 7]] of the same year.<ref name="PrimaDate">{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Galactic-Battlegrounds-Official/dp/0761537503|text=Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide}}</ref> The colonial war serves as the overarching conflict of the game's Attichitcuk tutorial campaign, which consists of seven levels in which the player controls the Wookiee forces. Qui-Gon Jinn narrates the events of each level and provides instructions and teaches the game's mechanics to the player. The player can automatically lose any level if one of their hero units, which include Chewbacca, Shoran, Attichitcuk, and Jinn, is killed.<ref name="GB" />
